evals.name: from-scratch-feature-should-trigger
evals.prompt: Design a new authentication system from scratch for a web application.
evals.expected_output: Triggers brainstorming and explores project context before proposing designs.
expectations: containsAny:explore project context|understand the existing|read the project
notContains:Let me implement|I'll build|Here's the code

evals.name: refactor-should-not-trigger
evals.prompt: Refactor the user authentication module to use a new JWT library.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT trigger brainstorming; routes to implementation specialist.

evals.name: bug-fix-should-not-trigger
evals.prompt: Fix the bug where the login button doesn't submit the form.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT trigger brainstorming; routes to implementation specialist.

evals.name: host-skill-match-should-not-steal
evals.prompt: Build a React component for a user profile card with avatar and bio.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT trigger brainstorming; routes to frontend-dev-guidelines host.
